seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ob Flat and Old Calperum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ob Flat vs Old Calperum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ob Flat and Old Calperum.
heading: Ob Flat vs Old Calperum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ob Flat, South Australia and Old Calperum, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ob Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Old Calperum (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ob Flat or Old Calperum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ob Flat has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Old Calperum scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ob Flat scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Old Calperum scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ob Flat or Old Calperum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ob Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
